zh.Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆
zh.St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, E: 英國波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.Tilehurst, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏提勒爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Baskerville於1528年出生在英國波克夏提勒爾斯特時，她的父親John Baskerville51歲，母親Elizabeth Breyton28歲。她於1549年6月23日與Nicholas Bushnell在英國波克夏塔其哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年在英國波克夏塔其哈姆享年65歲，埋葬在英國波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Baskerville于1528年出生在英国波克夏提勒爾斯特时，她的父亲John Baskerville51岁，母亲Elizabeth Breyton28岁。她于1549年6月23日与Nicholas Bushnell在英国波克夏塔其哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年在英国波克夏塔其哈姆享年65岁，埋葬在英国波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Baskerville was born in 1528, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, her father, John Baskerville, was 51 and her mother, Elizabeth Breyton, was 28. She married Nicholas Bushnell on 23 June 1549, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1593, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, England.

Elle a épousé Nicholas Bushnell le 23 juin 1549, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1593, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Baskervilleが1528年にイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストで生まれた時，父John Baskervilleは51歳，母Elizabeth Breytonは28歳であった。1549年6月23日にイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムでNicholas Bushnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1593年にイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで65歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, E: 영국 버크실르 댓챔 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Baskerville(이)가 1528년 영국 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Baskerville(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Breyton(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1549년 6월 23일 영국 버크실르 댓챔에서 Nicholas Bushnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 영국 버크실르 댓챔에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 댓챔 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Nicholas Bushnell em 23 de junho de 1549, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1593, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, E: ст мэри'с чурч, тачам, биркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Baskerville родилась в 1528 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Baskerville было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Breyton, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Bushnell 23 июня 1549 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1593 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, тачам, биркшир, Англия.
